channel.title: At The In Gate USHJA Zone Show Schedule
channel.description: Hunter jumper horse show schedule organized by USHJA zone.

item.title: Zone 9: Spring National Hunter
item.description: USHJA Zone 9 Handy Hunter Challenge at Spring National Hunter. Dates: Apr 15 - Apr 19, 2026. Location: Monroe, WA. Source: https://www.ushja.org/zones-affiliates/zone-9/competition
item.attheingate:program: Zone 9 Handy Hunter Challenge

item.title: Zone 6: Omaha Equestrian Preview
item.description: USHJA Zone 6 Handy Hunter Challenge at Omaha Equestrian Preview. Dates: Apr 16 - Apr 19, 2026. Location: Elkhorn, NE. Source: https://www.ushja.org/zones-affiliates/zone-6/competition-new
item.attheingate:program: Zone 6 Handy Hunter Challenge

item.title: Zone 4: Aiken Summer Classic I
item.description: USHJA Zone 4 Hunt & Go Team Challenge at Aiken Summer Classic I. Dates: Jun 10 - Jun 14, 2026. Location: Aiken, SC. Source: https://www.ushja.org/zones-affiliates/zone-4/competition-new
item.attheingate:program: Zone 4 Hunt & Go Team Challenge

item.title: Zone 6: Mid States Summer
item.description: USHJA Zone 6 Zandra Powers Horsemanship Class at Mid States Summer. Dates: Jun 10 - Jun 14, 2026. Location: Mason City, IA. Source: https://www.ushja.org/zones-affiliates/zone-6/competition-new
item.attheingate:program: Zone 6 Zandra Powers Horsemanship Class

item.title: Zone 5: Brave Horse V
item.description: USHJA Zone 5 Hunt & Go Team Challenge at Brave Horse V. Dates: Jun 25 - Jun 28, 2026. Location: Johnstown, OH. Source: https://www.ushja.org/zones-affiliates/zone-5/competition
item.attheingate:program: Zone 5 Hunt & Go Team Challenge

item.title: Zone 11: Princeton Show Jumping Summer II
item.description: USHJA notes that athletes from Zones 11 and 12 may qualify and apply to attend the Zone Jumper Championship location of their choosing. Princeton Show Jumping Summer II is one listed 2026 championship site. Dates: Jul 1 - Jul 5, 2026. Location: Princeton, NJ. Source: https://www.ushja.org/news/ushja-news-1/2026-dates-and-locations-announced-ushja-jumper-championships
item.attheingate:program: USHJA Zone Jumper Championship choice location

item.title: Zone 3: Rose Mount Farm Summer
item.description: USHJA Zone 3 equitation championship at Rose Mount Farm Summer. Dates: Jul 23 - Jul 26, 2026. Location: Spotsylvania, VA. Source: https://www.ushja.org/zones-affiliates/zone-3/competition
item.attheingate:program: L.M. Sandy Gerald USHJA Zone 3 Equitation Championship

item.title: Zone 2: Saratoga Summer
item.description: USHJA Zone 2 HOTY hunter, jumper, equitation, hunter breeding, and equitation medal championship at Saratoga Summer. Dates: Aug 12 - Aug 16, 2026. Location: Stillwater, NY. Source: https://www.ushja.org/zones-affiliates/zone-2/competition-new
item.attheingate:program: Zone 2 Horse of the Year and Equitation Championship

item.title: Zone 9: Northwest Spectacular
item.description: USHJA Zone 9 HOTY jumper and equitation championship at Northwest Spectacular. Dates: Aug 26 - Aug 30, 2026. Location: Wilsonville, OR. Source: https://www.ushja.org/zones-affiliates/zone-9/competition
item.attheingate:program: Zone 9 HOTY Jumper, Equitation, and Equitation Championship

item.title: Zone 1: ESE Heritage Show I
item.description: USHJA Zone 1 HOTY hunter, equitation, and hunter breeding championship at ESE Heritage Show I. Dates: Sep 2 - Sep 6, 2026. Location: West Springfield, MA. Source: https://www.ushja.org/zones-affiliates/zone-1/competition
item.attheingate:program: Zone 1 Horse of the Year Hunter, Equitation, and Hunter Breeding Championship

item.title: Zone 3: Warrenton Horse Show
item.description: USHJA Zone 3 HOTY hunter breeding championship at Warrenton Horse Show. Dates: Sep 2 - Sep 6, 2026. Location: Warrenton, VA. Source: https://www.ushja.org/zones-affiliates/zone-3/competition
item.attheingate:program: Zone 3 HOTY Hunter Breeding Championship

item.title: Zone 5: Showplace Fall Classic
item.description: USHJA Zone 5 HOTY hunter, jumper, and equitation championship at Showplace Fall Classic. Dates: Sep 2 - Sep 6, 2026. Location: Roscoe, IL. Source: https://www.ushja.org/zones-affiliates/zone-5/competition
item.attheingate:program: Zone 5 Horse of the Year Championship

item.title: Zone 1: Fieldstone Northeast Classic
item.description: USHJA Zone 1 HOTY jumper championship at Fieldstone Northeast Classic. Dates: Sep 8 - Sep 13, 2026. Location: Halifax, MA. Source: https://www.ushja.org/zones-affiliates/zone-1/competition
item.attheingate:program: Zone 1 Horse of the Year Jumper Championship

item.title: Zone 7: St. Louis National Charity
item.description: USHJA Zone 7 Hunt & Go Team Challenge at St. Louis National Charity. Dates: Sep 9 - Sep 13, 2026. Location: Lake St. Louis, MO. Source: https://www.ushja.org/zones-affiliates/zone-7/competition-new
item.attheingate:program: Zone 7 Hunt & Go Team Challenge

item.title: Zone 6: Mid States Fall
item.description: USHJA Zone 6 HOTY hunter, jumper, equitation, and hunter breeding championship at Mid States Fall. Dates: Sep 10 - Sep 14, 2026. Location: Mason City, IA. Source: https://www.ushja.org/zones-affiliates/zone-6/competition-new
item.attheingate:program: Zone 6 Horse of the Year Championship

item.title: Zone 9: Northwest Autumn Classic
item.description: USHJA Zone 9 HOTY hunter championship at Northwest Autumn Classic. Dates: Sep 16 - Sep 20, 2026. Location: Monroe, WA. Source: https://www.ushja.org/zones-affiliates/zone-9/competition
item.attheingate:program: Zone 9 HOTY Hunter Championship

item.title: Zone 3: WIHS Regional Horse Show
item.description: USHJA Zone 3 HOTY hunter and jumper championship plus Hunt & Go Team Challenge at WIHS Regional Horse Show. Dates: Oct 15 - Oct 18, 2026. Location: Leesburg, VA. Source: https://www.ushja.org/zones-affiliates/zone-3/competition
item.attheingate:program: Zone 3 HOTY Hunter and Jumper Championship

item.title: Zone 12: National Sunshine Series I
item.description: USHJA notes that athletes from Zones 11 and 12 may qualify and apply to attend the Zone Jumper Championship location of their choosing. National Sunshine Series I is one listed 2026 championship site. Dates: Oct 28 - Nov 1, 2026. Location: Thermal, CA. Source: https://www.ushja.org/news/ushja-news-1/2026-dates-and-locations-announced-ushja-jumper-championships
item.attheingate:program: USHJA Zone Jumper Championship choice location

item.title: Zone 4: Harvest Time
item.description: USHJA Zone 4 Hunt & Go Team Challenge at Harvest Time. Dates: Nov 4 - Nov 8, 2026. Location: Germantown, TN. Source: https://www.ushja.org/zones-affiliates/zone-4/competition-new
item.attheingate:program: Zone 4 Hunt & Go Team Challenge

item.title: Zone 5: WEC Midwest Indoors I
item.description: USHJA Zone 5 Horsemanship Class at WEC Midwest Indoors I. Dates: Nov 4 - Nov 8, 2026. Location: Wilmington, OH. Source: https://www.ushja.org/zones-affiliates/zone-5/competition
item.attheingate:program: Zone 5 Horsemanship Class

item.title: Zone 7: Southwest Autumn Classic
item.description: USHJA Zone 7 HOTY hunter, jumper, equitation, and hunter breeding championship at Southwest Autumn Classic. Dates: Nov 4 - Nov 9, 2026. Location: Katy, TX. Source: https://www.ushja.org/zones-affiliates/zone-7/competition-new
item.attheingate:program: Zone 7 Horse of the Year Championship

item.title: Zone 8: Tucson Fall Festival
item.description: USHJA Zone 8 HOTY hunter, jumper, and equitation championship at Tucson Fall Festival. Dates: Nov 4 - Nov 8, 2026. Location: Tucson, AZ. Source: https://www.ushja.org/zones-affiliates/zone-8/competition
item.attheingate:program: Zone 8 Horse of the Year Championship

item.title: Zone 10: National Sunshine Series II
item.description: USHJA Zone 10 HOTY hunter and jumper championship plus Hunt & Go Team Challenge at National Sunshine Series II. Dates: Nov 4 - Nov 8, 2026. Location: Thermal, CA. Source: https://www.ushja.org/zones-affiliates/zone-10/competition
item.attheingate:program: Zone 10 Horse of the Year Championship

item.title: Zone 4: SFHJA Charity Horse Show
item.description: USHJA Zone 4 HOTY hunter, jumper, and hunter breeding championship at SFHJA Charity Horse Show. Dates: Nov 18 - Nov 22, 2026. Location: Wellington, FL. Source: https://www.ushja.org/zones-affiliates/zone-4/competition-new
item.attheingate:program: Zone 4 Horse of the Year Championship
